proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_tamoxifen remains associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_palbociclib remains associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_trastuzumab remains associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_olaparib remains associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan remains associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment for stage, ECOG, age, key biomarkers, and labs, treatment_pembrolizumab remains associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_tamoxifen = -0.0026 months, p=0.832

Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_palbociclib = +1.1016 months, p=0

Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_trastuzumab = -0.0113 months, p=0.419

Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_olaparib = -0.0204 months, p=0.278

Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan = +0.0318 months, p=0.0888

Adjusted OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + 14 covariates (age, ecog, stage_iv, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low, BRCA1/2, PIK3CA): coef on treatment_pembrolizumab = -0.0243 months, p=0.12

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ER-positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen prolongs pfs_months.
Among ER-negative patients, treatment_tamoxifen does not prolong pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_tamoxifen × er_positive interaction on pfs_months.

Among HER2-negative patients, treatment_trastuzumab does not prolong pfs_months.
treatment_trastuzumab × her2_positive interaction on pfs is positive.

Among patients with neither BRCA mutation, treatment_olaparib does not prolong pfs_months.
treatment_olaparib × any_brca interaction on pfs is positive.

Among TNBC-like (er_positive==0 AND her2_positive==0) patients, treatment_pembrolizumab prolongs pfs_months.
treatment_pembrolizumab × TNBC interaction on pfs is positive.

treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs differs between stage_iv==1 and stage_iv==0 (interaction).
treatment_trastuzumab effect on pfs differs between stage_iv==1 and stage_iv==0 (interaction).
treatment_olaparib effect on pfs differs between stage_iv==1 and stage_iv==0 (interaction).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan effect on pfs differs between stage_iv==1 and stage_iv==0 (interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs differs between stage_iv==1 and stage_iv==0 (interaction).

treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs is attenuated as ecog_ps increases (negative interaction).

treatment_olaparib effect on pfs is attenuated as ecog_ps increases (negative interaction).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan effect on pfs is attenuated as ecog_ps increases (negative interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs is attenuated as ecog_ps increases (negative interaction).
In a multivariable OLS with all features and treatments simultaneously, treatment_palbociclib remains the dominant positive treatment effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Full multivariable model treatment coefs (months): treatment_palbociclib: +1.1011 (p=0); treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan: +0.0334 (p=0.0493); treatment_tamoxifen: -0.0078 (p=0.482); treatment_trastuzumab: -0.0091 (p=0.472); treatment_pembrolizumab: -0.0195 (p=0.169); treatment_olaparib: -0.0264 (p=0.122). R²=0.792

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs benefit of treatment_palbociclib is largest in patients who are er_positive==1 AND pik3ca_mutation==0 (canonical palbo-sensitive subgroup), reflecting a positive triple interaction palbo×er_positive×(1-pik3ca).
In the ER+/PIK3CA-wt subgroup, treatment_palbociclib produces a substantially larger pfs_months benefit than in the complement.

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by palbo within er_positive==1 AND pik3ca_mutation==0
Welch t-test pfs by palbo OUTSIDE ER+/PIK3CA-wt
analyses.result_summary: Outside subgroup: palbo pfs=4.321 (n=9394) vs 4.315 (n=17818), diff=+0.006, p=0.829

proposed_hypotheses.text: In ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt patients, treatment_palbociclib produces the largest pfs_months benefit; outside this subgroup the benefit is small or absent.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib effect on pfs_months is modified by patient features; we screen all candidate modifiers for interactions.
treatment_olaparib's pfs benefit is concentrated in patients with brca1_mutation==1 OR brca2_mutation==1.

analyses.code: For each modifier m: OLS pfs ~ treatment_olaparib + m + treatment_olaparib:m; report all p<0.05
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib interaction screen: significant modifiers (0/23):  | top 5 by p: brca1_mutation:p=0.0659; brca2_mutation:p=0.163; stage_iv:p=0.184; her2_positive:p=0.189; albumin_g_dl:p=0.238

analyses.result_summary: BRCA-mutated subgroup: olaparib pfs=4.933 (n=239) vs 4.587 (n=2260), diff=+0.346, p=0.0414

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs is modified by patient features; we screen all candidates.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_tamoxifen effect on pfs is modified by patient features; we screen all candidates.

analyses.code: For each modifier m: OLS pfs ~ treatment_tamoxifen + m + treatment_tamoxifen:m
analyses.result_summary: Tamoxifen interaction screen: significant modifiers (1/23): stage_iv: coef=-0.1180,p=0.0209 | top 5 by p: stage_iv:p=0.0209; brca1_mutation:p=0.0769; ki67_pct:p=0.118; nlr:p=0.158; er_positive:p=0.27

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a joint model containing palbociclib×er_positive and palbociclib×pik3ca_mutation simultaneously, both interactions remain large and significant: palbo benefits ER+ patients, and PIK3CA mutation suppresses the palbo benefit.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ palbo + er_pos + pik3ca + palbo:er_pos + palbo:pik3ca
analyses.result_summary: Joint model: palbo main=+0.552 (p=7.87e-37); palbo×er_positive=+1.571 (p=5.69e-230); palbo×pik3ca=-1.601 (p=2.03e-256)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The maximally enriched palbociclib-benefit subgroup is er_positive==1 AND her2_positive==0 AND pik3ca_mutation==0; within this subgroup the pfs benefit of treatment_palbociclib exceeds 2 months, while in the complement the benefit is approximately zero.

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by palbo within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt
Welch t-test pfs by palbo OUTSIDE ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt
Welch t-test pfs by palbo within ER-/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt
Welch t-test pfs by palbo within ER+/HER2+/PIK3CA-wt
Welch t-test pfs by palbo within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-mut

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_palbociclib prolongs pfs_months substantially in patients with er_positive==1 AND her2_positive==0 AND pik3ca_mutation==0; outside this subgroup the effect is null. The PIK3CA-mutated state suppresses palbociclib benefit.
FINAL: treatment_olaparib prolongs pfs_months in BRCA1- or BRCA2-mutated patients (any_brca==1); the effect is absent in BRCA wild-type.
FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab prolongs pfs_months modestly in the TNBC-like subgroup (er_positive==0 AND her2_positive==0); the effect is absent or null elsewhere.
FINAL: treatment_tamoxifen does not produce a clinically meaningful pfs_months benefit in any tested subgroup of this cohort, including ER-positive patients.

FINAL: treatment_trastuzumab does not produce a measurable pfs_months benefit in any tested subgroup, including HER2-positive patients (which is unexpected biologically and likely reflects this dataset's structure).
FINAL: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan does not produce a measurable pfs_months benefit in tested subgroups including her2_low==1 patients.

analyses.code: Within TNBC: screen pembro × each modifier
analyses.result_summary: Within-TNBC pembro × modifier top hits: postmenopausal:coef=-0.242,p=0.025; node_positive:coef=+0.200,p=0.0574; pr_positive:coef=-0.201,p=0.165
